chief-aus.concept: Carnivore Biltong Statics
chief-aus.primary_text:
Introducing the ultimate carnivore snack for your primal lifestyle: Carnivore Biltong, crafted from 100% organic, grass-fed, and grass-finished beef.

We've stripped away all the unnecessary additives to bring you a pure, protein-packed snack that's as simple as it is satisfying. 

Made with just beef, salt, and vinegar, our biltong is naturally more tender and healthier than jerky, without any herbs, spices, or preservatives.

Each 30g serving delivers a powerful protein punch of 14.1g, supporting your muscles and keeping you fueled throughout the day. With zero carbs and only 1.9g of fat per serving, it's the perfect snack for those following a carnivore or low-carb diet.

🥩 100% Organic Grass-Fed Beef 🥩 High in Protein, Zero Carbs 🥩 No Preservatives or Additives 🥩 Gluten and Dairy Free 🥩 FODMAP Friendly 🥩 Halal Certified

Our Carnivore Biltong is ideal for on-the-go snacking, pre or post-workout fuel, or as a satisfying addition to your carnivore meal plan. 

Packed in convenient 30g bags, it's ready to eat whenever and wherever your primal instincts kick in.
chief-aus.headline: The Ultimate Carnivore Snack

chief-aus.concept: Beef Liver Iron Effectiveness

✅ Grass-fed and grass-finished Australian beef liver
✅ Heme iron for superior absorption
✅ No synthetic binders or fillers
✅ Gentle on your digestive system
✅ Freeze-dried to preserve nutrients

Stop fighting your gut with synthetic iron. 

Get the nutrition your ancestors thrived on - without having to eat liver.
